hero.title: Reconcile your bank and payment data in minutes
hero.subtitle: Upload your files and get a clean, matched report instantly.
hero.privacy: We don't store your data. Ever.

problem.title: The reconciliation problem
problem.description: Small businesses lose time and money every month to manual financial reconciliation.
problem.subtitle: Small businesses lose time and money every month to manual financial reconciliation.

problem1.title: Manual reconciliation is slow
problem1.description: Hours spent cross-referencing bank statements with payment provider exports, line by line.

problem2.title: Spreadsheets cause errors
problem2.description: Copy-paste mistakes, wrong formulas, and missed transactions lead to costly discrepancies.

problem3.title: Hard to track mismatches
problem3.description: Finding which transactions don't match across systems is like searching for a needle in a haystack.

benefit1.title: Save hours
benefit1.description: What used to take half a day now takes minutes.

benefit3.title: Instant clarity
benefit3.description: See exactly which transactions match and which don't.

benefit4.title: No setup
benefit4.description: No integrations, no onboarding. Just upload and go.

solution.title: How it works
solution.description: Three steps. No setup. No account required.
solution.subtitle: Three steps. No setup. No account required.

step1.title: Upload
step1.description: Drop your bank CSV and payment provider CSV into Selthiron.

step2.title: Match
step2.description: Our engine normalizes and cross-references every transaction automatically.

step3.title: Review
step3.description: See matched, unmatched, and flagged transactions in a clear report.

preview.title: See it in action
preview.description: A clear, instant overview of your reconciliation results.
preview.subtitle: A clear, instant overview of your reconciliation results.
